tasks.label: NetMap: Build & Run
tasks.command: xcodebuild -project '${workspaceFolder}/NetMapApp/NetMap.xcodeproj' -scheme NetMap -configuration Debug -destination 'platform=macOS' build 2>&1 || true && open "$(xcodebuild -project '${workspaceFolder}/NetMapApp/NetMap.xcodeproj' -scheme NetMap -configuration Debug -showBuildSettings 2>/dev/null | grep ' BUILT_PRODUCTS_DIR' | awk '{print $3}')/NetMap.app"

tasks.label: Server: Build
tasks.command: SWIFT=$(command -v swift 2>/dev/null || echo /usr/local/swift-6.0.3-RELEASE-ubuntu22.04/usr/bin/swift) && cd '${workspaceFolder}/NetMapServer' && "$SWIFT" build 2>&1 && '${workspaceFolder}/NetMapServer/bump-version.sh' && echo "📦 $(cat '${workspaceFolder}/NetMapServer/VERSION')"

tasks.label: Server: Restart
tasks.command:
launchctl unload ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.netmap.server.plist 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti tcp:8092 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; echo '⏹  Ancien processus arrêté'; sleep 1; cd '${workspaceFolder}/NetMapServer' && nohup .build/debug/App >> /tmp/netmap_server.log 2>&1 & disown
sleep 2 && sudo caddy reload --config '${workspaceFolder}/NetMapServer/Caddyfile' --adapter caddyfile 2>/dev/null || sudo caddy start --config '${workspaceFolder}/NetMapServer/Caddyfile' --adapter caddyfile 2>/dev/null; sleep 3 && tail -8 /tmp/netmap_server.log

tasks.label: iPhone: Build & Install
tasks.command: xcodebuild -project '${workspaceFolder}/NetMapApp/NetMap.xcodeproj' -scheme NetMap -configuration Release -destination 'platform=iOS,id=00008101-000C28493EF1001E' build 2>&1 || true && xcrun devicectl device install app --device 00008101-000C28493EF1001E "$(xcodebuild -project '${workspaceFolder}/NetMapApp/NetMap.xcodeproj' -scheme NetMap -configuration Release -destination 'platform=iOS,id=00008101-000C28493EF1001E' -showBuildSettings 2>/dev/null | grep ' BUILT_PRODUCTS_DIR' | awk '{print $3}')/NetMap.app" 2>&1
